sentences.arabic: أَجْرَى الطَّبِيبُ فَحْصًا طِبِّيًّا مَجَّانِيًّا لِأَبْنَاءِ الْحَيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar je obavio besplatni zdravstveni pregled za mještane.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor held a free medical checkup for neighborhood residents.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْكِبَارِ وَالصِّغَارِ لِلْفَحْصِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi stariji i mlađi su došli na pregled.
sentences.translationEn: Many adults and children came for the checkup.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَ الطَّبِيبُ النَّاسَ بِالأَكْلِ الصِّحِّيِّ وَالرِّيَاضَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar je savjetovao ljude da jedu zdravo i vježbaju.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor advised people to eat healthy and exercise.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ النَّاسُ الطَّبِيبَ عَلَى تَفَانِيهِ وَخِدْمَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su zahvalili ljekaru na predanosti i usluzi.
sentences.translationEn: People thanked the doctor for his dedication and service.
